Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: picture books [300026446], documents by form [300137954], document genres [300026031], information forms (objects) [300220751], Information Forms (hierarchy name) [300026029], Visual and Verbal Communication (hierarchy name) [300264552], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Books that tell one or more stories entirely through pictures without text, including both books intended for children and those with adult fictional subject matter.
Libros que cuentan una o más historias únicamente a través de ilustraciones sin texto, incluyendo tanto libros para niños como aquellos con temática de ficción para adultos.
Boeken die een of meer verhalen bevatten die uitsluitend door middel van afbeeldingen, dus zonder tekst, worden verteld. Het kan zowel om kinderboeken gaan als om fictie voor volwassenen.
書中沒有文字，完全用圖片述說一個以上的故事，包括以兒童為對象，和具成人虛構題材的書。
Buch, das eine oder mehrere Geschichten ausschließlich durch Bilder ohne Text erzählt; schließt sowohl Bücher für Kinder als auch solche mit fiktionalem Inhalt für Erwachsene ein.

Term_Source.Page: Here are entered picture books consisting of one or more stories without text.
Children's lit editor at Booklist says they use this term. Phone conversation 5/15/95.
188, used once in text, in annotation of bibliography entry
search on CDROM db at Sawyer 5/22/95 retrieved 1 record with term in abstract.
Collections of pictures specially drawn; usu. for children, and bound up w/o wordsintohardcovers.

Source.Source_ID: 2000029881/Peterson and Solt, Newbery and Caldecott Medal and Honor Books (1982)

Term_Source.Page: IND, discussion at p.20, states it can have "mature fictional subject matter"

Source.Source_ID: 2000029881/Peterson and Solt, Newbery and Caldecott Medal and Honor Books (1982)

Term_Source.Page: IND, discusses at pp.184-92; used many times in text
